# Spike On The Water — llms.txt

Site name: Spike On The Water
Preferred domain: https://www.spikeonthewater.ca/
Owner: Shane "Spike" DesLoges
Phone: +1-416-890-5899
Location: Ontario, Canada (mobile — serving Toronto, Oakville, Burlington, Hamilton and surrounding marinas)

## About
Spike On The Water is a professional mobile yacht and boat detailing service operating across Ontario's freshwater lakes and marinas. Founded and operated by Shane "Spike" DesLoges with 28+ years of marine detailing experience. Services are fully documented with defined service levels and measurable results.

## Core Services
- Deck Washes (Levels 1–4): https://www.spikeonthewater.ca/deck-washes
- Deck Polishing: https://www.spikeonthewater.ca/deck-polishing
- Hull Washes: https://www.spikeonthewater.ca/hull-washes
- Bottom Prep & Antifouling: https://www.spikeonthewater.ca/bottom-prep
- Interior Detailing (Levels 1–4): https://www.spikeonthewater.ca/interior-details
- Surface Protections (Spike's PT, SiO2, Wax): https://www.spikeonthewater.ca/protections
- Extra Services: https://www.spikeonthewater.ca/extra-services
- Workshops & Training: https://www.spikeonthewater.ca/workshops
